## Where to request
@discussion or suggestions page

## Feature Description
Describe the feature clearly.

## Problem it solves
Why is this needed?

## Proposed Solution
How you think it should work.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches?

## Additional context
Add mockups, diagrams, or references.
